market_note: USDC now commands ~70% of stablecoin transaction volume vs ~25% for USDT, as MiCA's July 1 deadline pushes EU exchanges to delist non-compliant USDT.

stablecoin_items.headline: GENIUS Act capital/reserve rules due July 18
stablecoin_items.summary: Six federal agencies are finalizing GENIUS Act stablecoin rules, with the OCC setting a $5M capital floor and the FDIC confirming no deposit insurance applies to token holders.

stablecoin_items.headline: EU exchanges restrict USDT after MiCA deadline
stablecoin_items.summary: Binance, Kraken, Coinbase and others have delisted or restricted USDT for EU users since MiCA's July 1 transitional deadline ended; Revolut will drop USDT for EEA/Swiss users by Aug 31.

stablecoin_items.headline: USDC overtakes USDT in transaction volume
stablecoin_items.summary: Circle's USDC drove ~70% of adjusted stablecoin transaction volume in H1 2026 versus ~25% for Tether's USDT, per JPMorgan and industry data, as stablecoin volume hits record $1.79T.

stablecoin_items.headline: UK finalizes systemic stablecoin oversight plan
stablecoin_items.summary: The Bank of England and FCA are building a two-tier UK regime: FCA oversight for all qualifying stablecoins, plus joint supervision for issuers deemed systemic; consultation closes Sept 22.

hack_items.headline: "Hackers' Day": three DeFi exploits, $35.55M lost
hack_items.summary: AFX Trade (Arbitrum perps DEX) lost $24.15M, VerusCoin's Ethereum bridge lost $7.54M, and B² Network lost $3.86M in separate attacks within hours on July 23.

hack_items.headline: Verus Ethereum bridge drained again via old exploit path
hack_items.summary: Attackers reused the same import-path vulnerability weaponized in May to steal $7.54M from the Verus Ethereum Bridge, its second breach in just over two months.

hack_items.headline: B² Network loses $3.86M to upgrade-authority hijack
hack_items.summary: An attacker seized upgrade authority over B² Network's staking contract, draining roughly $3.86M in the third "Hackers' Day" incident.

hack_items.headline: Ostium hit for up to $24M via oracle key compromise
hack_items.summary: Arbitrum-based perpetuals exchange Ostium suffered an oracle manipulation exploit after an attacker compromised a price-oracle private key, pushing fake future-dated price signs onchain.
